vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

verify.rule: All required fields are present and valid.
The estimated mass does not exceed the specified budget.
Each physical feature in the part_tree is represented with explicit geometry_ops.
Interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems, specifying connection_type, DOF, clearance, and required_feature.
Critical joints have visible locking methods and preload/torque intent.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on harmonic drive due to insufficient heat dissipation.
risk.mit: Increase the number of thermal fins or consider additional cooling methods.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief at cable entry.
risk.mit: Implement robust strain relief features at cable entry points.

risk.desc: Mounting holes may not align perfectly with the base plate center due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Use precision machining techniques and ensure tight tolerances during manufacturing.

risk.desc: Harmonic drive housing might experience wear over time due to high torque loads.
risk.mit: Select materials with higher fatigue resistance and consider redesigning the housing for better load distribution.

risk.desc: Base plate may deform under heavy loads if not properly reinforced.
risk.mit: Add stiffening ribs or increase the thickness of the base plate.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

Training-quality rule: make part_tree children and geometry_ops mutually traceable by id/name.
name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.
critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential thermal issues due to proximity of slip ring and high-power components.
risk.mit: Implement heat sinks near high-power components and conduct thermal analysis.

risk.desc: Difficulty in accessing slip ring and harness clip for maintenance.
risk.mit: Ensure easy access to slip ring and harness clip by designing accessible cutouts.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to complex interfaces.
risk.mit: Include alignment pins and ensure proper assembly order hints are provided.

risk.desc: Potential for cable harness damage due to inadequate strain relief.
risk.mit: Ensure harness crossing joints has slack loops and strain relief at both ends.

risk.desc: Risk of overhangs in LPBF causing quality issues.
risk.mit: Optimize part orientation and add support structures for overhangs.
